narrative:
Lick Twp township has 1,655 registered voters, with 53.8% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 34.7% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 11.5%, a pronounced Republican lean of 23.1 percentage points.
